expertise.title: Frontend Development
expertise.subtitle: React, Next.js, Angular
expertise.description: Passionate about crafting responsive and performant user interfaces with modern JavaScript frameworks. Proficient in building scalable web applications using React ecosystem, Next.js for SSR, and Angular for enterprise solutions. Strong foundation in semantic HTML, CSS, and TypeScript.

expertise.title: Backend Development
expertise.subtitle: Go, Gin, MySQL
expertise.description: Experienced in building robust and high-performance RESTful APIs using Go with Gin framework. Skilled in database design, query optimization, and data management with MySQL. Focused on clean architecture, efficient code, and scalable backend solutions.

expertise.title: UI/UX Design
expertise.subtitle: Figma, Prototyping
expertise.description: Combining technical expertise with design thinking to create intuitive and visually appealing user experiences. Proficient in using Figma for designing interfaces, creating interactive prototypes, and conducting user testing for Android applications. Bridging the gap between design and development.
